assessment.note: Avoiding high-ambiguity forums to not sound underprepared is a strong growth constraint and mild pullback in engagement; also hints at confidence/clarity issues worth probing later.

new_queue.label: High-ambiguity forums
new_queue.name: High-ambiguity forums — what makes those rooms feel risky for you?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific avoidance pattern to surface the real constraint behind stalled stretch.

new_queue.label: Feels solid now
new_queue.name: What's feeling most solid in your design lead work right now?
new_queue.description: Surfaces what is stable and reliable in his current scope before probing for stretch.

new_queue.label: Direction
new_queue.name: When you imagine yourself eighteen months from now, what's actually different?
new_queue.description: Probes whether they have a real picture of where they want to go.

new_queue.label: Named destination
new_queue.name: What kind of design leadership would make the next step feel real for you?
new_queue.description: Moves from vague ambition to a concrete picture of the next level Toby wants.

new_queue.label: Sponsorship need
new_queue.name: What kind of sponsorship would actually change the way your work lands here?
new_queue.description: Explores whether external backing is the missing ingredient without assuming it is.

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: Given what we've talked through, what would you want to focus on first over the next two weeks?
new_queue.description: Closes on a concrete next move and turns the growth conversation into an actionable commitment.
